title: Question: Multidriven warning
body:
---


Author Name: **Kartik Raju**
Original Redmine Message: 1547 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I have attached the code. I am getting MULTIDRIVEN Warning on grant_reg_bo assignment. Every always process is assigning to a different slice. If i add verilator lint_off MULTIDRIVEN i am able to proceed. My question is if Verilator will still generate the right code here?
